Soil/Rock Description: Rounded and subrounded COBBLES in a fine to coarse GRAVEL. No recovery assumed finer material washed out.
Rounded and subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL. No recovery assumed finer material washed out.

Moderately weak, brownish grey, spotted black and yellow, moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely to widely spaced, narrow, rough undulating, limonitic stained and weathered joints dipping 15° to 35°.

Moderately strong, brownish grey, spotted black, moderately to highly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with extremely closely to closely spaced, weathered, narrow to narrow, rough steeped, limonitic and weathered stained joints, dipping 15° to 35°.

Moderately strong to strong, brownish grey, spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely to widely spaced, very rough to extremely narrow, limonitic stained joints, dipping 5° to 35°.
Strong, brownish grey, spotted black and white, slightly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with medium spaced, extremely narrow, clean joints, dipping 5° to 10°.
